content.en:
In front of the Ten Directions Sacred Realm.

Ye Tian led the Terran army to descend and directly entered the Ten Directions Saint Realm.

"From today onwards, the Ten Directions Holy Realm belongs to our human race!"

Ye Tian's voice permeated the entire Ten Directions Saint Realm.

Such an arrogant declaration immediately angered many forces in the Ten Directions Holy Realm.

......

Ten Directions Sacred Realm, destroy Dragon Mountain.

This is the territory of one of the three thousand evil clans in the Dark Sanctuary, and the geniuses of the dragon evil clan have fought down.

The Dragon Evil Clan is in a very good position among the Three Thousand Evil Clans, with three Superior Domain Ancestors and many Invincible Domain Ancestors.

At this time, Gu Luolu, the genius leader of the Dragon Evil Clan, looked through the layers of void and looked in the direction where the human race was located.

At this time, the major forces in the entire Dark Sacred Domain had already possessed the technique of transforming into a half-step Soul Ancestor, and now that the Dragon Evil Clan had transformed into a half-step Soul Ancestor, they had also been promoted to Soul Ancestor one by one.

Moreover, there were a lot of resources in the Ten Directions Saint Realm, coupled with the strong support of the Dragon Evil Clan, they made every effort to cultivate Gu Luo Lu, thus raising Gu Luo Lu's cultivation to the level of the strongest Soul Ancestor, which can be said to be a concentrated cultivation of one person with the strength of one clan.

Among the Ten Directions Saint Realm, his Gu Luo Lu's strength was enough to rank in the top ten.

"Terran, is it the race where the Ten Thousand Laws War Ancestor is located?" Gu Luo Lu said coldly: "The strength of the Ten Thousand Laws War Ancestor is indeed very strong, comparable to a half-step ancestor, but the Terran only gave birth to a Ten Thousand Laws War Ancestor, and everyone else is an ant, a group of Terrans dare to threaten to occupy the Ten Directions Saint Realm, it's really arrogant!"

Now.

His Dragon Evil Clan also occupied an area in the Ten Directions Saint Realm, cultivated a large number of subordinates, and was extremely powerful.

"Listen to my orders and exterminate the Terrans!"

Gu Luo commanded.

Rumble!!!!!!

A venerable Soul Ancestor was dispatched, and a large number of half-step Soul Ancestors were also mobilized and killed against the human race.

This time, the Terran angered the forces of the entire Ten Directions Saint Realm, and many forces came to kill one after another, vowing to kill the Terran.

-------------------------

"It's coming!"

Ye Tian sensed the arrival of a large number of soul ancestors, and a terrifying tide of soul energy surged.

Compared to so many Soul Ancestors, the Terrans are indeed not enough in terms of quantity.

However, the soul ancestors of the human race were all top-notch soul ancestors, coupled with Ye Tian, an almost invincible supreme soul ancestor, the ordinary supreme soul ancestor was like an ant in his eyes.

The first to arrive was the Dragons.

"Kill them!"

Gu Luo commanded.

As one of the evil clans, they don't know what it means to threaten and be greedy, and they will kill when they encounter it, without any nonsense.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian gave an order, and the top soul ancestors of the human race made a move together.

In this fight, Gu Luolu was stunned.

"It's all top-notch soul ancestors, how can this be, why is the human race progressing so fast?"

Gu Luo Lu couldn't believe it.

I saw that as soon as the two sides collided, the soul ancestors of the Dragon Evil Clan were killed one after another.

Gu Luolu didn't dare to fight with so many top Soul Ancestors of the Human Race, the strength of the Supreme Soul Ancestor like him was not strong, after all, the cultivation time was short, but the cultivation had reached the level of the Supreme Soul Ancestor, and he had not even mastered a few soul skills at the Soul Ancestor level, and his combat power was even comparable to that of the average Supreme Soul Ancestor, but he couldn't compete with tens of thousands of top Soul Ancestors on his own.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian made a move, and a soul spear pierced through in an instant.

Poof!

Gu Luo Lu was killed in one blow in an instant, and he didn't even have the slightest power to resist.

Soon, the dragon demon clan was destroyed.

Subsequently, one by one, the forces encountered the Terrans.

Ye Tian led the human race to exterminate one force after another, almost sweeping the Ten Directions Saint Realm.

In the end, dozens of Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Ten Directions Saint Realm united and joined forces to prepare to attack and kill Ye Tian.

As a result, Ye Tian instantly killed these dozens of Supreme Soul Ancestors.

Decades later, the human race unified the Ten Directions Sacred Realm and completely occupied the Ten Directions Saint Realm.

---------------

Beyond the Dark Souls.

The Superior Domain Ancestors of the Dragon Evil Clan had already known that the geniuses of the Dragon Evil Clan had been completely wiped out by the Human Race, and they were immediately very annoyed.

But they didn't dare to get angry, after all, their strength was very weak, far inferior to Ye Tian, how could they be qualified to be angry with Ye Tian.

However, the Terran Race occupied the Ten Directions Sacred Realm, and this matter attracted the attention of the ancestors.

After all, the Dark Soul Domain is only a few dozen Saint Realms now, and if the Battle Gate occupies a Saint Realm, it would be relatively normal.

But now, it's just a human race, occupying a holy realm alone, which is too shocking.

Especially when they learned that a Supreme Soul Ancestor had swept everything and no one could stop them, they suspected that the Terran had cheated.

But no matter how much they investigated, they couldn't find any problems.

"Focus on the Terrans in the future!"

The Dark Sanctuary and the Eternal Cult's ancestors have given this order.

And the other Holy Gates of the Dark Sanctuary also began to pay attention to the Terrans, after all, the Terrans occupied a Sacred Realm, and the speed of future development was bound to be very fast, which was a great disaster.

After the human race occupied the Ten Directions Saint Realm, Ye Tian concentrated a large amount of resources to continuously promote the cultivation of the Soul Ancestor, and at the same time, the ontology was not limited, and he continued to create a Soul Technique, even a Saint Technique suitable for the Soul Ancestor.

In a flash, 100 million years have passed since the Terrans entered the Dark Soul Domain.

At this time, the Dark Soul Domain ushered in the second metamorphosis, and at this time, the Domain Ancestor below the Supreme Domain Ancestor was allowed to enter.

And so.

A large number of top domain ancestors have entered it, and many of them are at the level of the Holy Son, who can leapfrog and kill ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestors, and there are even Holy Endowments.

When these top domain ancestors entered the Soul Ancestor, it was naturally impossible for them to follow the path of the Soul Ancestor, and besides, the Ancestors had no way to deduce the exercises that made the Domain Ancestor become a Soul Ancestor.

These top domain ancestors are all fully confident of entering the Supreme Domain Ancestor realm, even if it is difficult to follow the path of the Domain Ancestor in the Dark Soul Domain, they still have the hope of forcibly breaking the shackles and being promoted to the Supreme Domain Ancestor.

Once they are promoted to the Supreme Soul Ancestor, their strength will be very strong, even crushing the Supreme Soul Ancestor of the Dark Soul Domain.

In this way, the pattern of the Dark Soul Domain will change, and the territory of power will also change.

For example, some forces such as the Dragon Evil Clan have sent a large number of top domain ancestors, and the Dragon Evil Clan has also sent a holy endowment, who is the heir of one of the three supreme domain ancestors of the Dragon Evil Clan, the Hundred Ghost Evil Ancestor, named the Scorpion Holy Son, whose strength is very strong, once he enters the Dark Soul Domain, he can immediately impact the realm of the Powerful Domain Ancestor.

Once the Scorpion Saint Son stepped into the Supreme Domain Ancestor, he didn't know how many times stronger than the ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestor.

Coupled with the resources of the Dragon Demon Clan, the strength will increase again.

At that time, they will launch an attack on the terrans of the Ten Directions Holy Realm.
